title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese outlines four rules for prompting Claude Code effectively: prompt skills rather than the model directly, recognize skills as more than prompts, build composable skills instead of custom ones, and design skills that improve across sessions. He claims these rules are derived from studying how Anthropic engineers actually use the tool.
